description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, boxy shape with a textured brown exterior that resembles a woven or patterned surface. The body is rigid and appears to be made from a hard material, possibly reinforced leather or a synthetic composite, giving it a structured silhouette. Two thin, straight metallic rods extend from either side, likely representing handles or decorative elements, and are attached at the midline of the shorter sides. The handbag lacks visible seams, zippers, or flaps, suggesting a minimalist design with a focus on geometric form. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or hardware aside from the rods. The overall appearance is utilitarian and understated, suitable for urban environments where durability and simplicity are valued.
description: A rigid, rectangular brown handbag with a textured surface and two thin metallic rods extending from its sides, featuring a minimalist and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The handbag is seen from the side, showing its rectangular face and both metallic rods extending horizontally.
description_view_1: A narrow end view reveals the thin profile of the handbag and the rod protruding outward.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view displays the full rectangular face and both rods, mirroring the opposite side.
description_view_3: Another end view, identical to view 1, showing the slim edge and a single rod.
attribute_strap_type: two rigid, straight metallic rods, fixed length, side attachment, non-adjustable
attribute_closure_mechanism: none visible; closure mechanism not apparent from exterior
